scripts.video: npm run prepare-video && npx remotion render video/src/index.ts OB1AgentDashboard output/OB1-Agent-Dashboard-Walkthrough.mp4 --codec=h264 --audio-codec=aac
scripts.endcap: npm run prepare-video && npx remotion render video/src/index.ts OB1AgentMemoryEndcap output/OB1-Agent-Memory-Endcap-No-Audio.mp4 --codec=h264 --muted
scripts.announcement: npm run prepare-video && npx remotion render video/src/index.ts OB1AgentMemoryAnnouncement output/OB1-Agent-Memory-Announcement-15s-No-Audio.mp4 --codec=h264 --muted
scripts.build: npm run screenshots && npm run guide && npm run voiceover && npm run video
